---
title: "CV"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/philip-khor/cv/main/cv/philip_khor-cv.pdf">
---

Redirecting to CV… [click here if not redirected](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/philip-khor/cv/main/cv/philip_khor-cv.pdf).
